authors.author: John L. Bell
John L. Bell
Kaum war Tag und Nacht (Seid eingeladen)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Exceedingly, Abundantly Above all, all you could ask or think According to, the power That worketh in you, you…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is able to do just what he said he would do He's gonna fulfill every promise to you Don't give up on God, cause he won't give up on you He's able
